use_cases: Displaying product features with icons and descriptions on landing pages
Showcasing service capabilities in a visually appealing card format
Creating feature grids for SaaS and product marketing sites
Adding decorative grid patterns to feature sections
Building feature comparison or highlight sections
ai_summary: A minimalist feature card component with an overlaid grid pattern background and gradient mask effects. Displays feature icons, titles, and descriptions with subtle visual depth through SVG patterns and CSS masks. Designed for SaaS and product landing pages to showcase key features in an elegant, modern card format.
